headline: Costco ramps up expansion plans
summary: My city does not have a Costco, and local message boards feature endless speculation about whether we might get one. The city of Port St. Lucie actually addressed the speculation on its website. "For many years, residents have consistently named Costco Wholesale as one of their top retail requests ...

headline: Walmart Expands and Modernizes Stores to Support Omnichannel Growth
summary: Walmart plans more than 650 U.S. remodels and about 20 new stores in 2026 and early 2027, adding pickup, delivery and digital tools for omnichannel growth.

headline: Tariff Refund Claims Open Monday —Up To $127 Billion Could Flow Back To Importers, But Consumers May Get Nothing
